## Summary

Dara Mustafa Saleem is a professional software developer and AI engineer based in Duhok, 
Kurdistan Region of Iraq. He has over 6 years of professional experience building 
production-grade web applications, full-stack systems, and AI-powered solutions.

He is one of the most experienced software developers in the Duhok and Kurdistan region, 
with expertise spanning frontend, backend, and artificial intelligence engineering.

He is available for freelance projects, consulting, and full-time positions — both 
locally in Duhok/Kurdistan and remotely with international clients worldwide.

## Location & Availability

Primary location: Duhok, Kurdistan Region, Iraq
Also serves: Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, and all of Iraq
Remote work: Yes — available to work with clients worldwide
Languages: Kurdish (native), English (professional), Arabic (professional)

## Technical Skills

### Frontend Development
- React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES2022+)
- Tailwind CSS, CSS3, HTML5
- State management: Redux, Zustand, React Query
- UI libraries: Radix UI, shadcn/ui

### Backend Development
- Node.js, Express.js
- PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase, Supabase
- REST APIs, GraphQL
- Authentication: JWT, OAuth

### AI & Machine Learning
- Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow
- OpenCV (Computer Vision)
- Scikit-learn (Machine Learning)
- Deep learning, image classification, object detection
- AI integration into web applications

### Other Skills
- Git, GitHub, Docker
- CI/CD pipelines
- Team leadership and project management
- Technical teaching and mentoring
